name: 英雄救美＋暴力護花
description: Paul搶走Andrea的助聽器並羞辱她為聾子後，Ryan暴打Paul並奪回助聽器。觀眾積累的憤怒在Ryan出手的瞬間得到釋放，同時男主受傷的細節增加了感動值。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: Ryan, that's enough. Are you really going to beat him to death? / Didn't you hear they bullied Andrea? / Andrea cannot attend class without her hearing aid. I'll go to school first. / Did you get my hearing aid back? / They are just minor injuries.
